info.title: MICROSERVICE_DEV_Appointment Scheduling API
info.description: The Appointment Scheduling API facilitates the management of appointments within a service-oriented platform. Users can create, modify, or set up new appointments, allowing for seamless scheduling of resources such as meeting rooms or service personnel. This API is typically leveraged by businesses seeking to enhance customer engagement and improve operational efficiency through automated booking systems. Ideal consumers include developers building scheduling applications or integrations requiring real-time appointment management.

post.description: This endpoint allows users to create a new appointment by providing necessary details. Ensure to include all required information in the request body to successfully book the appointment.

requestBody.description: Contains the details required to create a new appointment. This should include necessary information such as the date, time, participants, and any relevant notes associated with the appointment.

200.description: Request processed successfully, appointments data returned.

400.description: Request contains invalid parameters or syntax errors.

500.description: An unexpected error occurred on the server while processing the request.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Creat.title: Appointment Operation Response

timestamp.description: The timestamp of the response generation.

status.description: The status code of the response.

error.description: Error message if the operation failed.

message.description: A human-readable message describing the result.
message.example: Unable to process appointment request due to internal service failure.

path.description: The request path that was used.

trace.description: A trace identifier for debugging purposes.

suggestion.description: Suggestions for further actions or corrections.
suggestion.example: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Creat.description: Response schema for successful appointment creation operation.

example.message: Unable to process appointment request due to internal service failure.

details.message: Database connection timeout while saving appointment details.

example.suggestion: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Creat.title: Appointment Request

patientId.description: The unique identifier of the patient.

doctorId.description: The unique identifier of the doctor.

appointmentDate.description: The date of the appointment in YYYY-MM-DD format.

appointmentTime.description: The time of the appointment in HH:MM format.

department.description: The name of the department where the appointment is scheduled.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Creat.description: Schema representing the request body for creating a new appointment.
